infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: LuckyDay saves your daily luck card to your photos so you can share it.

plugins.cameraPermission: LuckyDay uses the camera to capture your face, palms, and handwriting during setup.
plugins.photosPermission: LuckyDay can use selected photos for your local luck profile.

plugins.savePhotosPermission: LuckyDay saves your daily luck card to your photos so you can share it.
